text: I am the Evolution Scholar of Ignora. Bring me beast relics and I shall evolve them.
I can evolve Mystic Owlbear into Ancient Wolf.
I can evolve Ancient Wolf into Storm Minotaur.
I can evolve Arcane Kraken into Frozen Chimera.
I can evolve Frozen Chimera into Solar Cyclops.
I can evolve Mystic Basilisk into Thunder Golem.
I can evolve Thunder Golem into Infernal Cyclops.
I can evolve Mystic Wolf into Thunder Specter.
I can evolve Thunder Specter into Shadow Tiger.
I can evolve Shadow Owlbear into Shadow Tiger.
I can evolve Shadow Tiger into Mystic Serpent.
I can evolve Celestial Minotaur into Void Chimera.
I can evolve Void Chimera into Storm Golem.
I can evolve Celestial Wyvern into Astral Drake.
I can evolve Astral Drake into Shadow Titan.
I can evolve Wild Minotaur into Infernal Specter.
I can evolve Infernal Specter into Mystic Cyclops.
I can evolve Storm Chimera into Shadow Wyvern.
I can evolve Shadow Wyvern into Frozen Manticore.
I can evolve Storm Specter into Arcane Titan.
I can evolve Arcane Titan into Thunder Griffin.
I can evolve Lunar Manticore into Celestial Hydra.
I can evolve Celestial Hydra into Arcane Wyvern.
I can evolve Astral Cyclops into Crystal Hydra.
I can evolve Crystal Hydra into Void Chimera.
I can evolve Astral Specter into Celestial Manticore.
I can evolve Celestial Manticore into Solar Leviathan.
I can evolve Frozen Djinn into Astral Basilisk.
I can evolve Astral Basilisk into Infernal Wolf.
I can evolve Arcane Cyclops into Void Hydra.
I can evolve Void Hydra into Solar Serpent.
I can evolve Ancient Djinn into Arcane Griffin.
I can evolve Arcane Griffin into Solar Serpent.
I can evolve Lunar Phoenix into Shadow Griffin.
I can evolve Shadow Griffin into Solar Tiger.
I can evolve Solar Serpent into Wild Djinn.
I can evolve Wild Djinn into Frozen Serpent.
I can evolve Solar Minotaur into Frozen Phoenix.
I can evolve Frozen Phoenix into Void Cyclops.
I can evolve Wild Specter into Storm Hydra.
I can evolve Storm Hydra into Thunder Leviathan.
I can evolve Ancient Leviathan into Arcane Tiger.
I can evolve Arcane Tiger into Mystic Serpent.
I can evolve Crystal Cyclops into Infernal Owlbear.
I can evolve Infernal Owlbear into Astral Basilisk.
I can evolve Mystic Titan into Void Wyvern.
I can evolve Void Wyvern into Solar Djinn.
I can evolve Lunar Phoenix into Frozen Griffin.
I can evolve Frozen Griffin into Wild Owlbear.
I can evolve Void Hydra into Crystal Griffin.
I can evolve Crystal Griffin into Infernal Minotaur.
I can evolve Crystal Leviathan into Shadow Tiger.
I can evolve Shadow Tiger into Lunar Cyclops.
I can evolve Arcane Drake into Void Leviathan.
I can evolve Void Leviathan into Frozen Owlbear.
I can evolve Solar Griffin into Celestial Wyvern.
I can evolve Celestial Wyvern into Shadow Basilisk.
I can evolve Storm Golem into Void Basilisk.
I can evolve Void Basilisk into Frozen Basilisk.
I can evolve Wild Djinn into Arcane Titan.
I can evolve Arcane Titan into Solar Titan.
Choose a beast evolution.
